upgrades.name: Island Rank Up 1
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Reach Rank 1.  Some upgrades and unlocks will not be available until you have ranked up.  You will also instantly learn several new warp-related crafting recipes.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission ascends you to a new rank.

Craft the Proof of Determination from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Reach Rank 1.  Some upgrades and unlocks will not be available until you have ranked up.  You will also instantly learn several new warp-related crafting recipes.

upgrades.name: Island Rank Up 2
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Reach Rank 2.  Some upgrades and unlocks will not be available until you have ranked up.  You will also instantly learn several new warp-related crafting recipes.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission ascends you to a new rank.

Craft the Proof of Determination from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Reach Rank 2.  Some upgrades and unlocks will not be available until you have ranked up.  You will also instantly learn several new warp-related crafting recipes.

upgrades.name: Construct: Climate Control
upgrades.effect: New Infrastructure: Climate Control.  Control the climate within the bunker so it's not too warm in the summer or too cold in the winter.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will instantly enhance the bunker on your home island.

Craft a Lukewarm Sphere from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Infrastructure: Climate Control.  Control the climate within the bunker so it's not too warm in the summer or too cold in the winter.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Personal sunblock
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: The sun's rays cannot affect you while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Solar Refractor from sunglasses, glass and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: The sun's rays cannot affect you while on the island.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Personal Radiation Shield
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Radiation cannot affect you while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Focused Scrubber from janitor supplies.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Radiation cannot affect you while on the island.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Personal windblock
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: The winds cannot affect you while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Wind Redirector from wind-blocking clothes and creams.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: The winds cannot affect you while on the island.

components.name: Any Tallow (any)
components.tip: 1 tallow OR 1 mutant tallow OR 1 human tallow OR 1 mutant humanoid tallow OR 1 demihuman tallow

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Island-Side Resilience
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Your speed cannot be below its default while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft an Unyielding Sinew from fibers and cables.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Your speed cannot be below its default while on the island.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Personal temperature adjustement
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Temperature cannot affect you while on the island.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Climate Self-Injector from temperature-controlling devices and various parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Temperature cannot affect you while on the island.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Security Alpha
upgrades.effect: You can only ever equip one secure container.
upgrades.description:
You have been granted the recipe to craft an Alpha Secure Container.  This little miracle defies the very laws of physics and insists upon its own permanence.  In short, it will give you an integrated pocket you can always access.  The contents of this pocket are completely secure and will not be lost, even if you die and are returned to the island.

You can only ever equip one secure container.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Security Beta
upgrades.effect: With the supplied recipe, you will be able to expand the capacity of your secure container.
upgrades.description: With the supplied recipe, you will be able to expand the capacity of your secure container.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Security Gamma
upgrades.effect: With the supplied recipe, you will be able to expand the capacity of your secure container.
upgrades.description: With the supplied recipe, you will be able to expand the capacity of your secure container.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Security Epsilon
upgrades.effect: With the supplied recipe, you will be able to expand the capacity of your secure container.
upgrades.description: With the supplied recipe, you will be able to expand the capacity of your secure container.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Security Kappa
upgrades.effect: With the supplied recipe, you will be able to expand the capacity of your secure container to its maximum size.
upgrades.description: With the supplied recipe, you will be able to expand the capacity of your secure container to its maximum size.

upgrades.name: Craft: Warped Hauler's Harness Mk II
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Unlock ability to craft an upgraded warped hauler's harness mk II.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission unlocks a new item crafting recipe.

Craft the Ideal of Exercise from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Unlock ability to craft an upgraded warped hauler's harness mk II.

upgrades.name: Craft: Warped Hauler's Harness Mk III

upgrades.description:

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Landing 1
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Reveal a bit more of the map around your landing point, and increase the warpcloak invisibility grace period at the start of each expedition to 70 seconds.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Landing Pad from common cushions and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Waterwalking
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can walk on water.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Cloaking Buoyancy from things from water and things that float.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can walk on water.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Flight
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can fly.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft an Inverted Gravity Bubble from things that used to fly and things that could make someone fly.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can fly.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Phasing
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can pass through non-thick walls.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the Universal Access Pass from different tools granting access to restricted areas.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can pass through non-thick walls.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Scouting 1
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: Reveals slightly more of the map around exit points and mission targets.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Scouting Lens from high quality lenses and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Reveals slightly more of the map around exit points and mission targets.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Scouting Clairvoyance 1
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: See everything near you for a short time when beginning a mission.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the Higher Viewpoint from notes on the psychic and things that belong to the dead.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: See everything near you for a short time when beginning a mission.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Scouting Clairvoyance 2
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: See everything near you at the start of a mission of a longer time.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the All-Seeing Effigy from the remains of the observers and detection tools.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

upgrades.name: Upgrade: Stability 1
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: You will begin every expedition with the ability to withstand 9 pulses instead of the default 8, allowing you to stay out 12.5% longer before warpsickness takes over.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

upgrades.name: Unlock: Large Expeditions
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: You will be able to select Large Expeditions when leaving via the warp obelisk.  Large Expeditions last 2x as long, but mission targets and exit points are significantly farther away.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Warped Hourglass from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: You will be able to select Large Expeditions when leaving via the warp obelisk.  Large Expeditions last 2x as long, but mission targets and exit points are significantly farther away.

upgrades.name: Unlock: Extended Expeditions
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: You will be able to select Extended Expeditions when leaving via the warp obelisk.  Extended Expeditions last 3x as long, but mission targets and exit points are significantly farther away.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the Watch of Flowing Time from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: You will be able to select Extended Expeditions when leaving via the warp obelisk.  Extended Expeditions last 3x as long, but mission targets and exit points are significantly farther away.

upgrades.name: Unlock: Slaughter Missions
upgrades.effect: EFFECT: One special slaughter mission will be assigned during each expedition, rewarding warp shards if you kill a certain number of specifically targeted enemies before returning home.
upgrades.description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the Vengeance of the Island from experimental materials and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

upgrades.name: Unlock: Expedition Missions

upgrades.name: warped grass seeds
upgrades.effect: While these are certainly imbued with warp, they don't seem to have any supernatural powers beyond just growing quickly.  A nice option if you want to re-plant grass on your island, for decoration's sake.
upgrades.description: While these are certainly imbued with warp, they don't seem to have any supernatural powers beyond just growing quickly.  A nice option if you want to re-plant grass on your island, for decoration's sake.

upgrades.name: wood-floor tokens
upgrades.effect: A group of small squares of wood, smooth and polished.  You can use them to transform a section of flooring into interlocking wooden planks.
upgrades.description: A group of small squares of wood, smooth and polished.  You can use them to transform a section of flooring into interlocking wooden planks.

upgrades.name: flagstone tokens
upgrades.effect: A group of small stone stones, rough to the touch.  You can use them to transform a section of flooring into mortared flagstones.
upgrades.description: A group of small stone stones, rough to the touch.  You can use them to transform a section of flooring into mortared flagstones.

upgrades.name: sand tokens
upgrades.effect: A group of small yellow stones, gritty to the touch yet seemingly nothing ever rubs off.  You can use them to transform a section of flooring into fine sand.
upgrades.description: A group of small yellow stones, gritty to the touch yet seemingly nothing ever rubs off.  You can use them to transform a section of flooring into fine sand.

upgrades.name: flesh tokens
upgrades.effect: A group of small pieces of skin and meat, warm to the touch and fortunately never decaying.  You can use them to transform a section of flooring or wall into living flesh.
upgrades.description: A group of small pieces of skin and meat, warm to the touch and fortunately never decaying.  You can use them to transform a section of flooring or wall into living flesh.

components.name: Any Blood (any)
components.tip: 1 animal blood OR 1 mutant blood OR 1 blood OR 1 mutant human blood OR 1 demihuman blood OR 1 tainted blood OR 1 tainted human blood

components.name: Meat Offal (any)

expand.label: 4 of raw mutant humanoid heart pieces

components.tip: 4 of raw heart pieces OR 4 of raw human heart pieces OR 4 of raw demihuman heart pieces OR 4 of raw mutant heart pieces OR 4 of raw mutant humanoid heart pieces OR 4 of raw lung pieces OR 4 of raw human lung pieces OR 4 of raw demihuman lung pieces OR 4 of raw mutant lung pieces OR 4 of raw mutant lung pieces OR 4 of raw liver pieces OR 4 of raw human liver pieces OR 4 of raw demihuman liver pieces OR 4 canned liver OR 4 of raw mutant liver pieces OR 4 of raw kidney pieces OR 4 of raw human kidney pieces OR 4 of raw demihuman kidney pieces OR 4 of raw mutant kidney pieces OR 4 of raw sweetbread pieces OR 4 of raw human sweetbread pieces OR 4 of raw demihuman sweetbread pieces OR 1 raw offal OR 1 mutant organs

upgrades.name: flotation stone
upgrades.effect: This smooth, whorled stone seems cool and wet to the touch, but when you take your hand off it your skin is perfectly dry.  If you activate it, you will be able to walk on the surface of water for three minutes.
upgrades.description: This smooth, whorled stone seems cool and wet to the touch, but when you take your hand off it your skin is perfectly dry.  If you activate it, you will be able to walk on the surface of water for three minutes.

upgrades.name: vortex token
upgrades.effect: This irregular purplish lump seems to slowly pull in air even while you hold it in your hand.  If you have one with you when you activate the return obelisk and the obelisk is correctly configured, it will drag the entire contents of the room with you back up to your island.
upgrades.description: This irregular purplish lump seems to slowly pull in air even while you hold it in your hand.  If you have one with you when you activate the return obelisk and the obelisk is correctly configured, it will drag the entire contents of the room with you back up to your island.

upgrades.name: skyward beacon
upgrades.effect: This smooth purplish sphere seems like it wants to rise right out of your hand.  If you activate it, you will return directly to the island with everything you are carrying.
upgrades.description: This smooth purplish sphere seems like it wants to rise right out of your hand.  If you activate it, you will return directly to the island with everything you are carrying.

upgrades.name: earthbound pill
upgrades.effect: This pseudomagical pill extends the amount of time you can stay earthside by 4 pulses, or about 50% of a normal trip.  They're precious, but should help buy time for a difficult extract.  However, the air of the lower world destabilizes its structure and it will only last a single trip to the surface
upgrades.description: This pseudomagical pill extends the amount of time you can stay earthside by 4 pulses, or about 50% of a normal trip.  They're precious, but should help buy time for a difficult extract.  However, the air of the lower world destabilizes its structure and it will only last a single trip to the surface

upgrades.name: healing salve
upgrades.effect: A lump of purplish goo, smooth but yielding, sculptable like clay.  If you rub it on a wound, it will immediately heal some of the damage you have taken, but the air of the lower world destabilizes its structure and it will only last a single trip to the surface.
upgrades.description: A lump of purplish goo, smooth but yielding, sculptable like clay.  If you rub it on a wound, it will immediately heal some of the damage you have taken, but the air of the lower world destabilizes its structure and it will only last a single trip to the surface.

upgrades.name: homeward mote
upgrades.effect: Taking this rare and valuable artifact with you on an expedition is essentially buying life insurance.  If you die with this mote in your inventory, you will instead be restored to full health and brought home, WITH all items and equipment carried.  But this effect will only last for a single expedition.  Even if you extract safely, any and all motes carried on your person when you return home will be DESTROYED.
upgrades.description:
Though visibly little more than a glowing dustbunny, this strange ethereal mote of warp essence reveals, on closer inspection, something more.  A tiny, twisting, half-visible thread of shimmering bluish-purple trails away into the sky and far out of sight, unimpeded by any obstacles.

Taking this rare and valuable artifact with you on an expedition is essentially buying life insurance.  If you die with this mote in your inventory, you will instead be restored to full health and brought home, WITH all items and equipment carried.  But this effect will only last for a single expedition.  Even if you extract safely, any and all motes carried on your person when you return home will be DESTROYED.

upgrades.name: warped hauler's harness
upgrades.effect: A looped pair of shimmering blue-black straps that can be worn over the shoulders like a harness.  They can snugly fit a single item of nearly any size in comfort, and any burdens carried here feel three quarters as heavy.  Ideal for squeezing one more bulky item home through the exit when your hands are already full, or even some container packed full of other items!  Just beware you don't break your back doing it.
upgrades.description: A looped pair of shimmering blue-black straps that can be worn over the shoulders like a harness. upgrades.effect: A looped pair of shimmering blue-black straps that can be worn over the shoulders like a harness.  They can snugly fit a single item of nearly any size in comfort, and any burdens carried here feel a quarter as heavy.  Ideal for squeezing one more bulky item home through the exit when your hands are already full, or even some container packed full of other items!  Just beware you don't break your back doing it.
upgrades.description: A looped pair of shimmering blue-black straps that can be worn over the shoulders like a harness.  They can snugly fit a single item of nearly any size in comfort, and any burdens carried here feel a quarter as heavy.  Ideal for squeezing one more bulky item home through the exit when your hands are already full, or even some container packed full of other items!  Just beware you don't break your back doing it.

upgrades.name: warped animal carrier
upgrades.effect: A hand-sized cage with a shimmering portal at its aperture.  Despite being shaped more like a cat carrier, the power of warp enables it to capture creatures far bigger than you.  This may be your best bet for bringing animals home to your island sanctuary.  Activate to capture an adjacent animal, or to release a carried animal.
upgrades.description: A hand-sized cage with a shimmering portal at its aperture.  Despite being shaped more like a cat carrier, the power of warp enables it to capture creatures far bigger than you.  This may be your best bet for bringing animals home to your island sanctuary.  Activate to capture an adjacent animal, or to release a carried animal.

upgrades.name: Autodoc copyplate (inert)
upgrades.effect: This strange obsidian-colored plate is capable of mimicking the advanced tech found within a modern Autodoc, and can be used to create a working copy at your sanctuary.  However, it is inert in its current state and must first be imprinted on a working Autodoc.  To do so, find an Autodoc during an expedition and use the construction menu to imprint this plate.
upgrades.description: This strange obsidian-colored plate is capable of mimicking the advanced tech found within a modern Autodoc, and can be used to create a working copy at your sanctuary.  However, it is inert in its current state and must first be imprinted on a working Autodoc.  To do so, find an Autodoc during an expedition and use the construction menu to imprint this plate.

upgrades.name: Labs Catalyst
upgrades.effect: A bit of warp power, a magnetic stripe keycard from a dangerous place, and a little hope, blended well.  This item is required to begin a Labs expedition, and is consumed when leaving.
upgrades.description: A bit of warp power, a magnetic stripe keycard from a dangerous place, and a little hope, blended well.  This item is required to begin a Labs expedition, and is consumed when leaving.

upgrades.name: lucre lure
upgrades.effect: This irregular purplish lump shines like gold and is as heavy as gold too.  Activating it will attract a merchant to your trade stall when you next return from an expedition, whenever that should be.
upgrades.description: This irregular purplish lump shines like gold and is as heavy as gold too.  Activating it will attract a merchant to your trade stall when you next return from an expedition, whenever that should be.

upgrades.name: infinity tree sapling
upgrades.effect: A fragile little wisp of a sapling.  Its leaves shake and quiver, shimmering with strange energies.  Activate this on your island to place an infinity tree, which can be used as a catalyst to turn material tokens into wooden resources.
upgrades.description: A fragile little wisp of a sapling.  Its leaves shake and quiver, shimmering with strange energies.  Activate this on your island to place an infinity tree, which can be used as a catalyst to turn material tokens into wooden resources.

upgrades.name: infinity stone source
upgrades.effect: A crackling little cluster of pebbles that spark as they knock together, tumbling about from forces unseen.  Activate this on your island to place an infinity stone, which can be used as a catalyst to turn material tokens into stony and earthen resources.
upgrades.description: A crackling little cluster of pebbles that spark as they knock together, tumbling about from forces unseen.  Activate this on your island to place an infinity stone, which can be used as a catalyst to turn material tokens into stony and earthen resources.

upgrades.name: infinity ore crucible
upgrades.effect: A miniature tangle of metal that resembles a dust bunny made of barbed wire.  It twists in upon itself endlessly, folding and unfolding in ways that don't seem possible.  Activate this on your island to place an infinity ore, which can be used as a catalyst to turn material tokens into metal resources.

components.name: Steel Chunk Any (any)
components.tip: 1 chunk of steel OR 1 chunk of budget steel OR 1 cast iron chunk OR 1 chunk of mild steel OR 1 chunk of medium steel OR 1 chunk of high steel OR 1 chunk of hardened steel OR 1 chunk of tempered steel

components.name: Steel Lump Any (any)
components.tip: 1 lump of steel OR 1 lump of budget steel OR 1 cast iron lump OR 1 lump of mild steel OR 1 lump of medium steel OR 1 lump of high steel OR 1 lump of hardened steel OR 1 lump of tempered steel

upgrades.name: warped autodoc enhancer
upgrades.effect: A small device, so complex you can't entirely tell what it does.  You can see a miniature chair, a bed, some kind of machine, a computer console, a tangle of mechanical arms, all changing from moment to moment.  When used on an existing autodoc mark XI, you can upgrade it to a more advanced XXII model.

upgrades.name: warped autodoc augmenter

You can see a miniature chair, a bed, some kind of machine, a computer console, a tangle of mechanical arms, all changing from moment to moment.  When used on an advanced autodoc mark XXII, you can upgrade it to its most advanced XXXIII form.
